title: bridge.hello request params
description: Handshake initiated by the editor (client) toward the engine endpoint. Validates the `params` object of a bridge.hello request envelope.

role.description: Role of the connecting peer. For the alpha the editor is always the client that says hello.

clientName.description: Human-readable client product name, e.g. NorvesEditor.

protocolVersions.description: Protocol versions the client supports, in preference order. The server selects one and echoes it in the result.

capabilities.description: Optional capability tokens the client offers or requests. Negotiation semantics are described in docs/capabilities.md.
